runTitle: Vercel Production QA v8.11.75 - Direct AI page sidebar reopen

environment.backend: Cloud Run not exercised for AI generation

coveredSurfaces: production deployment smoke: /, /validation, /api/version passed for v8.11.75
GitLab main pipeline 2491298562 success and release tag pipeline 2491305401 success
/dashboard/ai-assistant desktop direct load renders full AI page with dialogCount=0
/dashboard/ai-assistant desktop left navigation text is 개요/서버/알림/로그/토폴로지 and does not include AI 어시스턴트
/dashboard/ai-assistant desktop top-right AI button opens the sidebar and remains open after 2.6s
/dashboard/ai-assistant desktop top-right AI button changes to close state after sidebar open
/dashboard/ai-assistant desktop left navigation collapses to 64px while AI sidebar is open
/dashboard/ai-assistant desktop AI sidebar fullscreen button closes the sidebar and stays on /dashboard/ai-assistant
/dashboard/ai-assistant mobile 390x844 direct load has no horizontal overflow before sidebar open
/dashboard/ai-assistant mobile top-right AI button opens a 390px dialog that fits the 390px viewport
Playwright browser console error check: 0 errors
skippedSurfaces: AI backend streaming response quality: not required for direct AI page/sidebar state regression
Cloud Run admin observability endpoints: out of scope for dashboard AI shell layout QA
core route broad pack beyond production smoke: unchanged by this targeted UI fix

expertAssessments.rationale: The regression is now covered by Vitest plus production Playwright checks for direct route load, manual sidebar reopen, fullscreen handoff, desktop rail collapse, mobile viewport fit, and console cleanliness.
Canonical main validation and v8.11.75 release tag pipelines completed successfully, Vercel deployment is Ready, /api/version serves 8.11.75, and usage check remains normal.

The tested behavior matches the chosen app-shell concept: AI is opened from the top-right action, the left navigation omits AI, the rail collapses while the right assistant is open, and the full AI route behaves as a dashboard function page.

usageChecks.summary: vercel usage checked after production QA; current billing period effective 19.7666 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed usage reported by CLI.

artifacts.note: Playwright production desktop viewport after direct /dashboard/ai-assistant load and top-right AI sidebar reopen

artifacts.note: 390x844 Playwright mobile viewport after direct /dashboard/ai-assistant load and top-right AI sidebar reopen

completedImprovements.title: 직접 /dashboard/ai-assistant 진입 후 상단 AI 버튼으로 우측 사이드바 재오픈 유지
completedImprovements.evidence: Production Playwright verified direct /dashboard/ai-assistant load starts with dialogCount=0, top-right AI button opens dialogCount=1 and remains open after 2.6s on v8.11.75.

completedImprovements.title: AI 전체 페이지 진입 시 사이드바 자동 닫힘 및 상단 버튼 재오픈
completedImprovements.evidence: Production Playwright verified the fullscreen button closes the sidebar, stays on /dashboard/ai-assistant, and the direct page can reopen the sidebar from the top-right action on v8.11.75.
